name: HTS_WORK_PATTERN_ASSIGNMENTS
description: Table to store the work pattern assignment information.

columns.Name: WORK_PATTERN_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Unique system generated identifier for a work pattern assignment.

columns.Name: SOURCE_WORK_PAT_TEMPLATE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of work pattern template which was used to create the work pattern.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person ID to which the work pattern is assigned.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Assignment ID of the person to which the work pattern is assigned.

columns.Name: WORK_PATTERN_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of the work pattern associated to this work pattern assignment.

columns.Name: WORK_PATTERN_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Category of work pattern that is assigned.

columns.Name: DATE_FROM
columns.Comments: Date from which the assignment of the work pattern is valid.

columns.Name: DATE_TO
columns.Comments: Date up to which the assignment of the work pattern is valid.

columns.Name: ANCHOR_DATE
columns.Comments: Date belonging to a week which follows Week 1 of the multi-week pattern.

columns.Name: ANCHOR_NUM
columns.Comments: Identifies the period in repeating period unit during which work pattern starts.

columns.Name: SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source through which work pattern was created

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
